w20: Accelerator-optimized instance with dual NVIDIA A100 GPUs and 160GB VRAM, paired with 340GB RAM and local NVMe SSDs, designed for demanding AI workloads.
c150: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g: Accelerator-optimized with 2x NVIDIA A100 80GB GPUs, 24 vCPUs, 340GB RAM, and 750GB local NVMe SSD.
c200: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g offers extreme acceleration with dual NVIDIA A100 80GB GPUs and 160GB total VRAM. Features 24 vCPUs, 340GB RAM, and 750GB local NVMe SSD for high-throughput AI/ML and data processing.
w150: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring an x86_64 architecture with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs (12 physical cores) operating at 2.2 GHz, complemented by 340 GB of RAM. While single-core CPU performance is weak and multi-core CPU performance is average, its primary strength lies in its dual NVIDIA A100 GPUs, providing a total of 160 GB of VRAM. Storage includes 750 GB of local NVMe SSD. Benchmark data indicates top-tier LLM inference speeds for prompt processing and text generation across various model sizes, demonstrating significant acceleration for AI workloads. Memory bandwidth is average, and certain single-threaded compression tasks show weak performance. This instance is well-suited for demanding AI/ML training, large language model inference, complex data science jobs, and other GPU-intensive computational tasks.
